domain: Andean Inca ayllu kinship social structure (Quechua/Aymara): extended-family network with putative founding ancestor; 2 moieties hanansaya (upper/senior) + hurinsaya (lower/junior) paired across; 3-tier labor exchange ayni (peer-bilateral reciprocal) + minka (community tribute upward to curaca local-elite) + mit'a (imperial mandatory labor-tax to apex Sapa Inca); pre-Columbian foundation of Andean civilization; collective territory management
specific_mechanism: AYLLU-MOIETY-DUAL-3-TIER-AYNI-MINKA-MITA-MULTI-AGENT-RECIPROCITY: K-agent kinship-based communication with (1) 2-moiety dual organization M_hanan/M_hurin: K agents organized into 2 moieties (upper-senior + lower-junior); pair-bonds across moieties; agents within moiety share founder-lineage; (2) 3-tier labor-exchange T_3: tier-1 ayni (peer-bilateral reciprocal task-exchange), tier-2 minka (community tribute upward to curaca coordinator), tier-3 mit'a (imperial mandatory tax to apex Sapa-Inca evaluator); (3) bilateral ayni reciprocity score r_ayni: track today-for-tomorrow debt-balance between agent pairs; penalty for chronic non-reciprocator; (4) minka-tribute curaca-coordinator: 1 curaca per moiety receives intermediate-result contributions + re-distributes coordination resources; (5) mit'a-imperial Sapa-Inca apex evaluator: 1 Sapa-Inca apex-agent collects final outputs + provides global-quality assessment; founder-distance determines seniority. Differs from R513 UMUNNA-KINDRED-SPOKESPERSON-2-TIER (2-tier kindred cluster + spokesperson agreement-score selection + low-bandwidth K-spokesperson council + umuada complementary parallel-track + gender-balanced final) and R525 SABAR-BAKKS-TAMA-LEAD-CONVERSATION (bakks fixed-utterance + tama lead-query + polyrhythmic concurrent + linguistic-pattern + ask-respond bind) and R538 KGOTLA-MMUALEBE-OPEN-SPEAK-CHAIR-WRAP-UP-CONSENSUS-MULTI-AGENT (open-speak inclusion + chair-LLM go-tshwaraganya synthesis + weak-voice preservation + acacia-tree shared-context + anti-polarization) by 2-moiety hanansaya/hurinsaya dual + 3-tier ayni/minka/mit'a labor-exchange + bilateral ayni reciprocity score + minka-tribute curaca-coordinator + mit'a-imperial Sapa-Inca apex evaluator.
llm_application: AYLLU-MOIETY-DUAL-3-TIER-AYNI-MINKA-MITA-MULTI-AGENT-RECIPROCITY K-agent kinship-based communication + 2-moiety hanansaya/hurinsaya dual organization + 3-tier ayni-peer-bilateral + minka-community-tribute-curaca + mit'a-imperial-tax-Sapa-Inca labor-exchange + bilateral ayni reciprocity score r_ayni debt-balance + minka-tribute curaca-coordinator intermediate-result + Sapa-Inca apex global-quality founder-distance seniority. Differs from R392. R403. R411. R443. R449. R463. R465. R488. R500. R513 UMUNNA (closest — 2-tier kindred + spokesperson). R525 SABAR-BAKKS (closest — bakks fixed-utterance + tama lead). R538 KGOTLA-MMUALEBE (closest — open-speak + chair-synthesis + weak-voice). Differs from Multi-Agent Collaboration Survey + Responsible LLM-MAS + MasRouter + RL Orchestration Traces by 2-moiety + 3-tier ayni/minka/mit'a + reciprocity score + curaca + Sapa-Inca. Differs by 2-MOIETY HANANSAYA/HURINSAYA DUAL + 3-TIER AYNI/MINKA/MIT'A LABOR-EXCHANGE + BILATERAL AYNI RECIPROCITY SCORE + MINKA-TRIBUTE CURACA-COORDINATOR + MIT'A-IMPERIAL SAPA-INCA APEX.
novelty_claim: Multi-Agent Collaboration Survey 2501.06322 + Responsible LLM-MAS 2502.01714 + MasRouter ACL 2025 + RL Orchestration Traces 2605.02801 cover multi-agent collaboration + routing + orchestration paradigm. AYLLU-MOIETY-DUAL-3-TIER-AYNI-MINKA-MITA-MULTI-AGENT-RECIPROCITY adds (a) 2-moiety dual + (b) 3-tier ayni/minka/mit'a + (c) bilateral ayni reciprocity score + (d) curaca coordinator + (e) Sapa-Inca apex evaluator. Recombination — borderline lookup.
